description_long: This is a modern, minimalist side table featuring a circular glass tabletop supported by a single, curved metallic pedestal. The pedestal is anchored to a matching circular metal base, providing stability and a sleek, contemporary aesthetic. The glass top is translucent and appears to be tempered for durability, while the metal structure has a brushed or matte finish. The design is open on one side, creating a cantilevered effect that allows for easy access and legroom. There are no visible decorative elements, handles, or drawers, emphasizing its clean lines and functional form. This table would be suitable for use in urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or modern public spaces.
description: A sleek, modern side table with a round glass top and a single curved metal pedestal anchored to a circular base. The design is minimalist and open, with a cantilevered structure for easy access.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved metal pedestal supporting the round glass top and connecting to the circular base.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the straight alignment of the pedestal and the symmetry of the round tabletop and base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the curved pedestal and cantilevered glass top visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the full width of the pedestal and the alignment of the tabletop and base.
